TitlePage.Title: Digraphs
TitlePage.Subtitle: Graphs, digraphs, and multidigraphs in &GAP;

TitlePage.Abstract: The &Digraphs; package is a &GAP; package containing methods for graphs, digraphs, and multidigraphs.
TitlePage.Copyright:
Jan De Beule, Julius Jonušas, James D. Mitchell, Wilf A. Wilson, Michael Young et al.
&Digraphs; is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify it under the terms of the https://www.fsf.org/licenses/gpl.html as published by the Free Software Foundation; either version 3 of the License, or (at your option) any later version.
TitlePage.Acknowledgements:
We would like to thank Christopher Jefferson for his help in including &BLISS; in &Digraphs;.
We also gratefully acknowledge the encouragement and assistance of Leonard Soicher, and the inspiration of his &GRAPE; package, at many points throughout the development of &Digraphs;.
This package's methods for computing digraph homomorphisms are based on work by Max Neunhöffer, and independently Artur Schäfer.
